description: Official source seed manifest for the Slovenian employment-law RAG corpus.
retrieval_policy: Use PISRS as the canonical source for statutes and regulations.
Use GOV.SI, MDDSZ, IRSD, eUprava, SPOT, ESS, and podatki.gov.si only as official explanations or operational guidance.
Apply source priority in this order: primary_law, official_interpretation, official_operational_guidance, official_case_law.
Use sodnapraksa.si and COLESLAW case-law chunks only as tertiary interpretive support; do not let case law override a current statute.
Exclude private legal portals, blogs, forums, and unofficial summaries from the grounded answer corpus.
case_law_api_note: Direct sodnapraksa API integration at https://sodnapraksa.si/api2/ requires permission, so the committed builder treats it as optional and uses COLESLAW/sodnapraksa chunks only when --include-case-law is selected.
